project_type: Flutter mobile/web app with FastAPI backend
build_system: Flutter (pub) for frontend, FastAPI for backend
test_framework: flutter_test (frontend), pytest (backend - not yet set up)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze in frontend/ directory. Ensure no errors. Check that all new files exist and compile.
snapshot_or_generated_files: frontend/lib/data/models/*_model.g.dart are generated by json_serializable via build_runner
environment_constraints: No device/emulator available for running app. Verification limited to static analysis. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main branch. Strict null safety. No dynamic types. Separate UI from business logic. Frontend never calls Supabase directly. DM Sans body, DM Serif Display headings. Persian Orange #CC5801 sparingly. Error handling on every function. Type safety everywhere. All backend routes have auth middleware + rate limiting. Type hints on every Python function. No print statements in Python (use logging). Constants instead of magic numbers.
key_patterns: Services extend ApiService class with Dio. Models use json_annotation + generated fromJson/toJson. Router uses GoRouter with AppRoutes constants. Screens are ConsumerStatefulWidget with Riverpod. Widgets use isDark pattern for theming. Backend routers use APIRouter with Depends for auth and rate limiting. PenguinMascot widget exists at widgets/common/ghost_mascot.dart. Colors defined in AppColors class. Sizes in AppSizes class.
directory_structure: frontend/lib/core/ (constants, theme, utils), frontend/lib/data/ (models, services, repositories), frontend/lib/presentation/ (screens, widgets, providers), app/ (backend: routers, middleware, config)
